description: Signicat is a European digital identity and trust services provider. It helps organisations verify identities, onboard customers, authenticate users, sign documents electronically, and automate identity and compliance workflows.
summary: Signicat exposes a suite of OAuth-protected HTTP APIs on developer.signicat.com covering authentication, identity verification, signing, workflow orchestration, monitoring, account/admin, usage, and related trust services; no public GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surfaces were found.
